---
title: "dplyr & tidyverse"
---

The grammar of data manipulation in R. Coming from SAS, this is the section that does the most work — `proc sql` and data steps map onto dplyr in mostly clean ways, but the mental model is different enough to be worth writing down.

## Entries

- [Week 2 — Core dplyr verbs](week2-core-verbs.qmd)

*More entries as I progress through the 26-week plan.*
